Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to be persisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated. Query for this using a projection query and fall back to the name.

Variable.name: identityManager
Variable.Description: The Manager of Identity being processed

Step.name: Launch ServiceNow Notification Workflow
Step.Description: Workflow step to Process the user that Leaver.Perform Removal Of role Access after 3 days

Step.name: Launch Remove Access Workflow
Step.Description: Workflow step to Process the user that Leaver.Perform Removal Of role Access after 3 days

Step.name: Create Termination Plan
Step.Description: Process the user whose expiration date is today and create a provisioning plan for the user's to remove system access.
